svg.title: Stacking Ensemble Architecture for MNIST Classification
svg.desc: Visual diagram of a stacking ensemble with 5 base models feeding into a meta-model (Logistic Regression), trained on out-of-fold predictions and max probabilities.
svg.text: Base models (level 0) — each tuned with GridSearchCV (cv=3)
OOF predictions (cross_val_predict, StratifiedKFold cv=5) → max probability per sample
